policy_statement: Kuwait's adaptation actions include implementing green belts and increasing protected areas to adapt to dust storms; green belt projects started in 2015 for a 5-year duration and consist of planted areas with trees and shrubs.
verbatim_text: In response, Kuwait has undertaken some adaptation projects such as implementing green belts project and increasing the protected areas to adapt to a dust storm. The green belt projects consist of planted areas with trees and shrubs of 50-180 Km in length and 5-20 Km in width. These projects have started in 2015 for 5-year duration time.
